#  How are Invoice and Contract Compliance different with Procore Pay? 
#####  General Availability in Select Markets (United States)
![Flag Us](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eb8f21ce49403a47d7bb5a0cedc7e0e9/7c0ec0977e654cc6bc9f3d8efa80fbe3/flag-us.png?fm=webp&h=14) [Procore Pay ](https://www.procore.com/pay) is available in the United States. It is designed for General Contractors and Owner-Builders who act as their own General Contractors on a job. Procore Pay extends the [Invoice Management](https://www.procore.com/invoice-management) functionality in the Procore web application to handle the payment process between general and specialty contractors.
##  Answer 
Procore Pay's compliance templates and compliance features address these needs:
  * _Contract Compliance_ (a.k.a., commitment compliance) covers the contractual agreements for purchase orders and subcontracts in Procore projects. For example, collecting a closeout document from a subcontractor is typically part of the subcontracting agreement.
  * _Invoice Compliance_ covers the compliance requirements on subcontractor invoices. For example, collecting a W-9 from a subcontractor submitting an invoice might be required for tax purposes.

title: How are Invoice and Contract Compliance different with Procore Pay?
